{{Use dmy dates|date=June 2021}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Namibia women's national football team}}
{{short description|National association football team}}
{{More citations needed|date=November 2020}}
{{Infobox National football team
| Name                  = Namibia
| Badge                 = Namibia FA.png
| Badge_size            = 200px
| Nickname              = ''Brave Warriors''
| Association           = [[Namibia Football Association]] (NFA)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Council of Southern Africa Football Associations|COSAFA]] (Southern Africa)
| Confederation         = [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]] (Africa)
| Coach                 = [[Collin Benjamin]]
| Captain               = [[Peter Shalulile]]
| Most caps             = [[Deon Hotto]] (86)
| Top scorer            = [[Peter Shalulile]] (20)
| Home Stadium          = [[Independence Stadium (Namibia)|Independence Stadium]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = NAM
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|NAM}}
| FIFA max              = 68
| FIFA max date         = November 1998
| FIFA min              = 167
| FIFA min date         = July 2006
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Namibia}}
| Elo max               = 100
| Elo max date          = 12 September 1998
| Elo min               = 165
| Elo min date          = 22 July 2006
| pattern_la1           = 
| pattern_b1            = _nam24h
| pattern_ra1           = _nam24h
| pattern_sh1           = 
| pattern_so1           = 
| leftarm1              = FF0000
| body1                 = FF0000
| rightarm1             = FF0000
| shorts1               = FF0000
| socks1                = FF0000
| pattern_la2           = 
| pattern_b2            = _nam24a
| pattern_ra2           = _nam24a
| pattern_sh2           = 
| pattern_so2           = 
| leftarm2              = 1651FE
| body2                 = 1651FE
| rightarm2             = 1651FE
| shorts2               = 1651FE
| socks2                = 1651FE
| pattern_la3           = 
| pattern_b3            = _nam24t
| pattern_ra3           = _nam24t
| pattern_sh3           = 
| pattern_so3           = 
| leftarm3              = FFFFFF
| body3                 = FFFFFF
| rightarm3             = FFFFFF
| shorts3               = FFFFFF
| socks3                = FFFFFF
| First game            = {{flagicon|RSA|1928}} '''South-West Africa''' 0–1 {{fb-rt|ANG}} <br> (Namibia; 16 May 1989)
| Largest win           = {{fb|NAM}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|BOT}} <br> ([[Windhoek]], Namibia; 25 August 1996) <br> {{fb|NAM}} 8–2 {{fb-rt|BEN}} <br> ([[Windhoek]], Namibia; 15 July 2000)
| Largest loss          = {{fb|EGY}} 7–1 {{fb-rt|NAM}} <br> ([[Cairo]], Egypt; 8 November 1996) <br> {{fb|EGY}} 8–2 {{fb-rt|NAM}} <br> ([[Alexandria, Egypt|Alexandria]], Egypt; 13 July 2001)
| Regional name         = [[Africa Cup of Nations]]
| Regional cup apps     = 4
| Regional cup first    = [[1998 Africa Cup of Nations|1998]]
| Regional cup best     = Round of 16 ([[2023 Africa Cup of Nations|2023]])
| 2ndRegional name      = [[African Nations Championship]]
| 2ndRegional cup apps  = 2
| 2ndRegional cup first = [[2018 African Nations Championship|2018]]
| 2ndRegional cup best  = Quarter-finals ([[2018 African Nations Championship|2018]])
| 3rdRegional name      = [[COSAFA Cup]]
| 3rdRegional cup apps  = 19
| 3rdRegional cup first = [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]]
| 3rdRegional cup best  = '''Champions''' ([[2015 COSAFA Cup|2015]])
| medaltemplates        =
{{MedalCompetition|[[COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{MedalGold|[[2015 COSAFA Cup|2015 South Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalSilver|[[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997 Southern Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalSilver|[[1999 COSAFA Cup|1999 Southern Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2022 COSAFA Cup|2022 South Africa]]|Team}}
{{MedalSilver|[[2024 COSAFA Cup|2024 South Africa]]|Team}}
}}

The '''Namibia national football team''' represents [[Namibia]] in men's international [[Association football|football]] and is controlled by the [[Namibia Football Association]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://soccernet.espn.go.com/blog/_/name/footballafrica/id/78?cc=5739 |title=Namibian football on the rise&nbsp;– ESPN FC |publisher=[[ESPN]] |access-date=2012-11-02 |archive-date=8 August 2017 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170808201306/http://www.espnfc.com/blog/football-africa/80/index |url-status=dead }}</ref> They have never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] but have made four appearances in the [[Africa Cup of Nations]]. The team represents both [[FIFA]] and [[Confederation of African Football]] (CAF).

==History==
Namibia played its first international under the name South-West Africa on 16 May 1989 at home against neighbouring [[Angola national football team|Angola]] and lost 1–0. On 23 March 1990, only two days after gaining independence from South Africa, they hosted neighbour [[Zimbabwe national football team|Zimbabwe]] and lost 5–1. On 7 June, they lost a home friendly 2–1 to [[Mauritius national football team|Mauritius]]. Namibia's next contests were played in Lesotho, where they lost 2–0 to their hosts on 1 August 1992, but gained their first ever draw in a 2–2 tie against the same opposition the very next day. Namibia's first win came on 1 July 1994 in a 1–0 victory away over [[Botswana national football team|Botswana]] in a friendly. On 17 May 1998, Namibia played their first match outside of Africa and against non-African opposition, losing 2–1 in a friendly in France against [[Saudi Arabia national football team|Saudi Arabia]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesn/nami-intres.html |title=Namibia International Matches |website=[[RSSSF]] |access-date=2 November 2012}}</ref>

[[File:2021-07-15 Fußball, 3. Liga, Teamfotos FSV Zwickau 1DX 6333 by Stepro.jpg|thumb|200px|left|[[Manfred Starke]] made his debut for Namibia in 2012]]

Namibia has made four appearances in the [[Africa Cup of Nations|African Cup of Nations]], going out in the first round in their first three competitions and going out in the Round of 16 in their fourth competition. In [[1998 Africa Cup of Nations|1998]], Namibia lost to [[Ivory Coast national football team|Ivory Coast]] 4–3 and drew [[Angola national football team|Angola]] 3–3 before losing to [[South Africa national football team|South Africa]] 4–1. In [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations|2008]], Namibia lost to [[Morocco national football team|Morocco]] 5–1 and to [[Ghana national football team|Ghana]] 1–0 but drew [[Guinea national football team|Guinea]] 1–1 in their last match. In [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations|2019]], they lost all their group games scoring only a single goal. They lost to [[Morocco national football team|Morocco]] 1–0, and suffered the same loss to [[South Africa national football team|South Africa]] before losing to [[Ivory Coast national football team|Ivory Coast]] 4–1. 

Namibia reached the Round of 16 for the first time in the [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations]], where they lost 3–0 against [[Angola national football team|Angola]].

{{clear}}

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Namibia national football team results (2020–present)}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group H#NAM v MWI|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 5 September
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
| score      = 1–2
| team2      = {{fb|MWI}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Obed Itani Chilume Stadium]]
| location   = [[Francistown]], Botswana
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = 
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group H#NAM v STP|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 9 September
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
| score      = 3–0
| team2      = {{fb|STP}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Obed Itani Chilume Stadium]]
| location   = [[Francistown]], Botswana
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = 
| result     = W
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group H#LBR v NAM|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 9 October
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|LBR}}
| score      = 3–1
| team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Samuel Kanyon Doe Sports Complex]]
| location   = [[Paynesville, Liberia|Paynesville]], Liberia
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = 
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group H#TUN v NAM|2026 FIFA World Cup qualification]]
| date       = 13 October
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|TUN}}
| score      = 3–0
| team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Hammadi Agrebi Stadium]]
| location   = [[Tunis]], Tunisia
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = 
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
| date       = 14 November
| time       = 
| team1      = {{fb-rt|COM}}
| score      = 1–0
| team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
| goals1     = 
*[[Aboubacar Ali Abdallah|Abdallah]] {{goal|84}}
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[:fr:Stade omnisports de Malouzini|Stade Omnisports de Malouzini]]
| location   = [[Moroni, Comoros|Moroni]], Comoros
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = https://www.facebook.com/share/1AC9CgCUt2/?mibextid=wwXIfr
| result     = L
}}
{{Footballbox collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
| date       = 17 November
| time       = {{UTZ|19:00|3}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|COM}}
| score      = 4–0
| team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
| goals1     = *[[Youssouf M'Changama|M'Changama]] {{goal|4}}
*[[Benjaloud Youssouf|Youssouf]] {{goal|22}}
*[[Aymeric Ahmed|Ahmed]] {{goal|69}}
*[[El Fardou Ben Nabouhane|Ben Nabouhane]] {{goal|77}}
| goals2     = 
| stadium    = [[Stade omnisports de Malouzini]]
| location   = [[Moroni, Comoros|Moroni]], Comoros
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| report     = https://www.panafricafootball.com/post/friendly-comoros-zimbabwe/
| result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
| date       = 25 March
| time       = {{UTZ|20:00|+5}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|KUW}}
| score      = Cancelled
| team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
| report     = 
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| location   = [[Astana]], Kazakhstan
| stadium    = [[Astana Arena]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = 
| result     = P
| note       = Match cancelled due to Kuwait withdrawing following the [[2026 Iran war]].
}}
{{football box collapsible|format=1
|round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)#Kazakhstan|2026 FIFA Series]]
|date       = 25 March 
|time       = {{UTZ|17:00|+5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|KAZ}}
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|NAM}}
|report     = https://www.soccerway.com/match/kazakhstan-l6fBVhqk/namibia-QLENxLuR/?mid=fPBGhyCk
|goals1     = 
*[[Yan Vorogovsky|Vorogovsky]] {{goal|12}}
*[[Alibek Kasym|Kasym]] {{goal|79}}
|goals2     = 
|location   = [[Astana]], Kazakhstan
|stadium    = [[Astana Arena]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Viktar Shymusik]] ([[Football Federation of Belarus|Belarus]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
| format     = 1
| round      = [[2026 FIFA Series (men's matches)|2026 FIFA Series]]
| date       = 28 March
| time       = {{UTZ|17:00|+5}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
| score      = 0–0
| team2      = {{fb|COM}}
| report     = https://www.soccerway.com/match/comoros-QLUC9wv3/namibia-QLENxLuR/?mid=GCoyD5c4
| goals1     = 
| goals2     = 
| penalties1 =
*[[Riaan Hanamub|Hanamub]] {{pengoal}}
*[[Bethuel Muzeu|Muzeu]] {{pengoal}}
*[[Aprocius Petrus|Petrus]] {{pengoal}}
*[[Wendell Rudath|Rudath]] {{pengoal}}
*[[Uetuuru Kambato|Kambato]] {{pengoal}}
|penaltyscore = 5–4
| penalties2 =
*{{pengoal}} [[Yannis Kari|Kari]]
*{{pengoal}} [[Idris Mohamed|Id. Mohamed]]
*{{penmiss}} [[Aboubacar Ali|Ali]]
*{{pengoal}} [[Akim Abdallah|Abdallah]]
*{{pengoal}} [[Raouf Mroivili|Mroivili]]
| location   = [[Astana]], Kazakhstan
| stadium    = [[Astana Arena]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = [[Arman Ismuratov]] ([[Kazakhstan Football Federation|Kazakhstan]])
| result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|COM}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Namibia
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|COM}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|NAM}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Comoros
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|CMR}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|NAM}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Cameroon
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|CMR}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Namibia
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|NAM}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|CGO}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Namibia
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|format = 1
|round = [[2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualification|2027 AFCON qualification]]
|date = TBD
|time = TBD
|team1 = {{fb-rt|CGO}}
|score =
|team2 = {{fb|NAM}}
|report =
|goals1 =
|goals2 =
|location = TBD, Congo
|stadium = TBD
|attendance =
|referee =
|result =
}}

==Coaching history==

[[File:Collin Benjamin 1860 2011 2.JPG|thumb|100px|[[Collin Benjamin]] became the manager of the national football team of Namibia in 2022]]

:Caretaker managers are listed in ''italics''.
{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Eric Muinjo]] (1992–1993)
* {{flagicon|ZIM}} [[Shepherd Murape]] (1994–1995)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Ruston Mogane]] (1997–1998)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Mlungisi Ngubane]] (1998)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Seth Boois]] (1998–1999)
* {{flagicon|GER}} [[Heinz-Peter Überjahn]] (1999)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Herman Katjiuongua]] (2000)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Lucky Richter]] (2000)
* {{flagicon|ROM}} [[Ted Dumitru]] (2000–2003)
* {{flagicon|ZIM}} ''[[Shepherd Murape]]'' (2004)
* {{flagicon|ZAM}} [[Ben Bamfuchile]] (2006–2007)
* {{flagicon|NED}} [[Arie Schans]] (2007–2008)
* {{flagicon|BEL}} [[Tom Saintfiet]] (2008–2010)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Brian Isaacs]] (2010–2011)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Bernard Kaanjuka]] (2011–2013)
* {{flagicon|SWE}} [[Roger Palmgren]] (2013)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Ricardo Mannetti]] (2013–2015)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Fillemon Kanalelo]] (2015)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Ricardo Mannetti]] (2015–2019)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} ''[[Bobby Samaria]]'' (2019–2021)
* {{flagicon|NAM}} [[Collin Benjamin]] (2022–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up to the squad for the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CAF Group H]] matches against [[Malawi national football team|Malawi]] and [[Equatorial Guinea national football team|Equatorial Guinea]] on 20 and 24 March 2025.<ref>{{cite news |title=Benjamin announces final squad for World Cup Q |url=https://nfa.org.na/benjamin-announces-final-squad-for-world-cup-q/ |access-date=17 March 2025 |publisher=Namibia Football Association |date=14 March 2025}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 28 March 2026, after the match against [[Comoros national football team|Comoros]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Lloyd Kazapua]]|age={{bda|1989|3|25|df=y}}|caps=44|goals=0|club=[[Sekhukhune United F.C.|Sekhukhune United]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Edward Maova]]|age={{bda|1994|9|5|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[Lamontville Golden Arrows F.C.|Lamontville Golden Arrows]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Kamaijanda Ndisiro]]|age={{bda|1999|12|1|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=0|club=[[Highbury F.C.|Highbury]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Riaan Hanamub]]|age={{bda|1995|2|8|df=y}}|caps=60|goals=0|club=[[AmaZulu F.C.|AmaZulu]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Charles Hambira]]|age={{bda|1990|6|3|df=y}}|caps=59|goals=3|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ivan Kamberipa]]|age={{bda|1994|2|3|df=y}}|caps=53|goals=2|club=[[Orapa United F.C.|Orapa United]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ngero Katua]]|age={{bda|2001|7|25|df=y}}|caps=30|goals=0|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sergio Damaseb]]|age={{bda|2000|2|13|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Mighty Gunners F.C.|Mighty Gunners]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tyrese Hikupembe]]|age={{bda|2000|5|6|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Blue Waters F.C.|Blue Waters]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sisqo Haraseb]]|age={{bda|2001|3|10|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=1|club=[[Mighty Gunners F.C.|Mighty Gunners]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Bonifasius Josef]]|age={{bda|1997|5|13|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[UNAM F.C.|UNAM]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tuhafeni David]]|age={{bda|2001|2|5|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Blue Waters F.C.|Blue Waters]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Johannes Mutanga]]|age={{bda|1993|2|15|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Blue Waters F.C.|Blue Waters]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Aprocius Petrus]]|age={{bda|1999|10|9|df=y}}|caps=55|goals=0|club=[[Cape Town City F.C. (2016)|Cape Town City]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dynamo Fredericks]]|age={{bda|1992|4|4|df=y}}|caps=52|goals=1|club=[[Jwaneng Galaxy F.C.|Jwaneng Galaxy]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Paulus Amutenya]]|age={{bda|2002|7|22|df=y}}|caps=24|goals=0|club=[[UNAM F.C.|UNAM]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Prins Tjiueza]]|age={{bda|2002|3|12|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=2|club=[[Cape Town City F.C. (2016)|Cape Town City]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Moses Shidolo]]|age={{bda|1998|5|20|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Matebele FC|Matebele]]|clubnat=BOT}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Penda Mongudhi]]|age={{bda|1994|11|25|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Deon Hotto]]|age={{bda|1990|10|29|df=y}}|caps=86|goals=12|club=[[Orlando Pirates F.C.|Orlando Pirates]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Willy Stephanus]]|age={{bda|1991|6|26|df=y}}|caps=69|goals=3|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Peter Shalulile]]|age={{bda|1993|3|23|df=y}}|caps=66|goals=20|club=[[Mamelodi Sundowns F.C.|Mamelodi Sundowns]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Bethuel Muzeu]]|age={{bda|2000|2|22|df=y}}|caps=38|goals=5|club=[[Black Leopards F.C.|Black Leopards]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Joslin Kamatuka]]|age={{bda|1991|7|22|df=y}}|caps=33|goals=4|club=[[Durban City F.C. (2024)|Durban City]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Elmo Kambindu]]|age={{birth date and age|1993|5|26|df=y}}|caps=31|goals=9|club=[[AmaZulu F.C.|AmaZulu]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Isaskar Gurirab]]|age={{bda|1998|1|3|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=2|club=[[Mamelodi Sundowns F.C.|Mamelodi Sundowns]]|clubnat=RSA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Leevi Alfeus]]|age={{bda|2001|1|18|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Eeshoke Chula Chula FC|Eeshoke Chula Chula]]|clubnat=NAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Wiseman Lifasi]]|age={{bda|2002|4|23|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=|clubnat=}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up for Namibia in the last 12 months.
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Jonas Mateus]]|age={{bda|1996|2|10|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Ongos Valley FC|Ongos Valley]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}; 10 October 2024<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Branco Rukoro]]|age={{bda|2005|5|1|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Desert Rollers F.C.|Desert Rollers]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Vitapi Ngaruka]]|age={{bda|1995|10|16|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Tuli Nashixwa]]|age={{bda|2002|5|23|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Ramblers F.C.|Ramblers]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kennedy Eib]]|age={{bda|1997|5|15|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Eeshoke Chula Chula FC|Eeshoke Chula Chula]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[David Aingwafa]]|age=''Unknown''|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Eeshoke Chula Chula FC|Eeshoke Chula Chula]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Abubakir Arend]]|age={{bda|2002|3|17|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Blue Waters F.C.|Blue Waters]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Erasmus Ikeinge]]|age={{bda|1995|2|8|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Khomas NAMPOL FC|Khomas NAMPOL]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|LES}}; 3 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kennedy Amutenya]]|age={{bda|1996|7|15|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=0|club=[[Gaborone United S.C.|Gaborone United]]|clubnat=BOT|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}; 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ndjiraeree Maharero]]|age={{bda|1994|5|28|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lawrence Doeseb]]|age={{bda|2003|6|4|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[Life Fighters F.C.|Life Fighters]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Mbakondja Tjahikika]]|age={{bda|2000|8|2|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Devin Somseb]]|age={{bda|1995|5|29|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[United Africa Tigers]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Simon Elago]]|age={{bda|2002|10|7|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Tura Magic F.C.|Tura Magic]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|LES}}; 3 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Romeo Kasume]]|age={{bda|1997|10|21|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[KF Liria Prizren|Liria Prizren]]|clubnat=KOS|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}; 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tjipe Karuuombe]]|age={{bda|2001|9|21|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=1|club=[[FC Dinamo Tbilisi|Dinamo Tbilisi]]|clubnat=GEO|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Edmar Kamatuka]]|age={{bda|2002|7|26|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[UNAM F.C.|UNAM]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dawid Ndeunyema]]|age={{bda|2002|8|22|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Blue Waters F.C.|Blue Waters]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}; 10 September 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Ben Richard Namib]]|age={{bda|1999|8|20|df=y}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[Khomas NAMPOL FC|Khomas NAMPOL]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|CAM}}; 7 September 2024<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Edmund Kambanda]]|age={{bda|1993|2|25|df=y}}|caps=13|goals=1|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=[[2024 COSAFA Cup]]}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Fares Haidula]]|age={{bda|1993|10|17|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Eeshoke Chula Chula FC|Eeshoke Chula Chula]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Godwin Eiseb]]|age={{bda|2000|5|4|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=1|club=[[African Stars F.C.|African Stars]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Rewaldo Prins]]|age={{bda|2003|2|25|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Marumo Gallants F.C.|Marumo Gallants]]|clubnat=RSA|latest=v. {{fb|KEN}}, 19 November 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Erastus Kulula]]|age={{bda|1997|2|27|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=1|club=[[KF Liria Prizren|Liria Prizren]]|clubnat=KOS|latest=v. {{fb|ZIM}}; 14 October 2024}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[George Frans]]|age={{bda|1998|11|1|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Khomas NAMPOL FC|Khomas NAMPOL]]|clubnat=NAM|latest=v. {{fb|CAM}}; 7 September 2024<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs break}}
<sup>DEC</sup> Player refused to join the team after the call-up.<br />
<sup>INJ</sup> Player withdrew from the squad due to an injury.<br />
<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad.<br />
<sup>RET</sup> Player has retired from international football.<br />
<sup>SUS</sup> Suspended from the national team.
{{nat fs end|background=}}

===Previous squads===
;Africa Cup of Nations squads
* [[1998 African Cup of Nations squads#Namibia|1998 African Cup of Nations squad]]
* [[2008 Africa Cup of Nations squads#Namibia|2008 Africa Cup of Nations squad]]
* [[2019 Africa Cup of Nations squads#Namibia|2019 Africa Cup of Nations squad]]
* [[2023 Africa Cup of Nations squads#Namibia|2023 Africa Cup of Nations squad]]

==Player records==
{{Updated|28 March 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Namibia |url=https://national-football-teams.com/country/127/Namibia.html |website=National Football Teams|access-date=7 June 2024}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Namibia.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Deon Hotto]]'''
|86
|12
|2013–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Denzil Haoseb]]'''
|84
|0
|2011–present
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Petrus Shitembi]]'''
|80
|4
|2011–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Ronald Ketjijere]]
|70
|2
|2010–2019
|-
|5
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Willy Stephanus]]'''
|69
|3
|2011–present
|-
|6
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Ananias Gebhardt]]'''
|66
|2
|2011–present
|-
|rowspan=3|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Johannes Hindjou]]
|66
|10
|1996–2005
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Absalom Iimbondi]]'''
|66
|7
|2015–present
|-
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Peter Shalulile]]'''
|66
|20
|2014–present
|-
|10
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Larry Horaeb]]
|62
|0
|2011–2021
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align:left;"|'''[[Peter Shalulile]]'''
|20
|66
|{{#expr:20/66 round 2}}
|2014–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align:left;"|[[Rudolph Bester]]
|13
|46
|{{#expr:13/46 round 2}}
|2004–2014
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Deon Hotto]]'''
|12
|86
|{{#expr:12/86 round 2}}
|2013–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Gervatius Urikhob]]
|11
|45
|{{#expr:11/45 round 2}}
|1992–2003
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Eliphas Shivute]]
|10
|42
|{{#expr:10/42 round 2}}
|1992–2001
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Johannes Hindjou]]
|10
|66
|{{#expr:10/66 round 2}}
|1996–2005
|-
|rowspan=2|7
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Elmo Kambindu]]'''
|9
|31
|{{#expr:9/31 round 2}}
|2019–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Benson Shilongo]]
|9
|36
|{{#expr:9/36 round 2}}
|2011–2021
|-
|rowspan=2|9
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Hendrik Somaeb]]
|8
|31
|{{#expr:13/46 round 2}}
|2011–2019
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Ruben van Wyk]]
|8
|36
|{{#expr:8/36 round 2}}
|1994–2002
|-
|}

==Competitive record==

===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=41|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1990 FIFA World Cup|1990]]
|colspan=8| ''Part of {{fb|RSA|1928}}''
|colspan=7| ''Part of {{fb|RSA|1928}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|4
|0
|0
|4
|0
|12
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|8
|2
|2
|4
|9
|18
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
|10
|1
|3
|6
|7
|27
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|1
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
|6
|2
|0
|4
|7
|12
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
|8
|3
|2
|3
|10
|4
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
|4
|1
|1
|2
|3
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
|8
|3
|2
|3
|9
|11
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
|10
|4
|3
|3
|13
|10
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total
!–
!{{Tooltip|0/8|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!–
!60
!16
!14
!30
!59
!103
|}

===Africa Cup of Nations===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[Africa Cup of Nations]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan|1956}}<br>[[1957 Africa Cup of Nations|1957]]<br>to<br>{{flagicon|Algeria}}<br>[[1990 Africa Cup of Nations|1990]]||colspan=8|''Part of {{fb|South Africa|1928}}''
|-
|{{flagicon|Senegal}}<br>[[1992 Africa Cup of Nations|1992]]<br>to<br>{{flagicon|Tunisia|1959}}<br>[[1994 Africa Cup of Nations|1994]]
|colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[1996 Africa Cup of Nations|1996]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Burkina Faso}}<br>[[1998 Africa Cup of Nations|1998]]
|Group stage
|14
|3
|0
|1
|2
|7
|11
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}}<br>{{flagicon|Nigeria}}<br>[[2000 African Cup of Nations|2000]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=4|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Mali}}<br>[[2002 Africa Cup of Nations|2002]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Tunisia}}<br>[[2004 Africa Cup of Nations|2004]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}}<br>[[2006 Africa Cup of Nations|2006]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Ghana}}<br>[[2008 Africa Cup of Nations|2008]]
|Group stage
|14
|3
|0
|1
|2
|2
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Angola}}<br>[[2010 Africa Cup of Nations|2010]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}}<br>{{flagicon|Gabon}}<br>[[2012 Africa Cup of Nations|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}}<br>[[2013 Africa Cup of Nations|2013]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Equatorial Guinea}}<br>[[2015 Africa Cup of Nations|2015]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Gabon}}<br>[[2017 Africa Cup of Nations|2017]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Egypt}}<br>[[2019 Africa Cup of Nations|2019]]
|Group stage
|23rd
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|6
|-
|{{flagicon|Cameroon}}<br>[[2021 Africa Cup of Nations|2021]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}}<br>[[2023 Africa Cup of Nations|2023]]
|Round of 16
|15th
|4
|1
|1
|2
|1
|7
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}}<br>[[2025 Africa Cup of Nations|2025]]
|colspan=8|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Kenya}}<br>{{flagicon|Tanzania}}<br>{{flagicon|Uganda}}<br>[[2027 Africa Cup of Nations|2027]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="2" |''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|}} [[2029 Africa Cup of Nations|2029]]
|-
!'''Total'''
!'''Round of 16'''
!'''4/35'''
!'''13'''
!'''1'''
!'''3'''
!'''9'''
!'''11'''
!'''31'''
|}

===African Nations Championship===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[African Nations Championship]] record
|-
!colspan=9|Appearances: 2
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Ivory Coast}} [[2009 African Nations Championship|2009]]||rowspan=4 colspan="8"|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Sudan}} [[2011 African Nations Championship|2011]]
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2014 African Nations Championship|2014]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Rwanda}} [[2016 African Nations Championship|2016]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[2018 African Nations Championship|2018]]||Quarter-finals|| 7th||4||2||1||1||3||3
|-
|{{flagicon|Cameroon}} [[2020 African Nations Championship|2020]]||Group stage||15th||3||0||1||2||0||4
|-
|{{flagicon|Algeria}} [[2022 African Nations Championship|2022]]||colspan=8|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} [[2024 African Nations Championship|2024]]
| colspan="8" |''Did not qualify''
|-
!'''Total'''
!'''Quarter-finals'''
!'''2/7'''
!'''7'''
!'''2'''
!'''2'''
!'''3'''
!'''3'''
!'''7'''
|}

===COSAFA Cup===
{{main|COSAFA Cup}}

==Head-to-head record against other nations==
''Updated on 28 March 2026 after match against [[Comoros national football team|Comoros]]''<ref>{{cite web|url=http://eloratings.net/Namibia|title=World Football Elo Ratings: Namibia|publisher=Elo Ratings|access-date=24 October 2018|archive-date=30 October 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20181030090807/http://eloratings.net/Namibia|url-status=live}}</ref>

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Positive Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Neutral Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Negative Record|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center"
|-
!width=220|Opponent<br />
!width=100|Pld<br />
!width=70|W<br />
!width=70|D<br />
!width=70|L<br />
!width=100|GF<br />
!width=100|GA<br />
!width=120|GD
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ALG}} || 4 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 0 || 7 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ANG}} || 16 || 0 || 7 || 9 || 9 || 25 || −16
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BEN}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 8 || 4 || +4
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BOT}} || 20 || 2 || 11 || 7 || 18 || 19 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BFA}} || 3 || 0 || 0 || 3 || 2 || 11 || −9
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|BDI}} || 4 || 1 || 1 || 2 || 7 || 8 || –1
|-
|- bgcolor= CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CHA}} || 4 || 3 || 0 || 1 || 7 || 4 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CMR}} || 6 || 1 || 2 || 3 || 3 || 8 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COM}} || 8 || 3 || 2 || 3 || 8 || 7 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CGO}} || 6 || 1 || 2 || 3 || 3 || 9 || −6
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|DJI}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 0 || +4
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|COD}} || 3 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 7 || 4 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|EGY}} || 6 || 0 || 1 || 5 || 6 || 23 || −17
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ERI}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 1 || +3
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ETH}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 4 || 2 || +2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|EQG}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GAB}} || 2 || 0 || 2 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GAM}} || 4 || 2 || 1 || 1 || 5 || 5 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GHA}} || 3 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GUI}} || 10 || 1 || 2 || 7 || 4 || 19 || −15
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|GNB}} || 2 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0 || 1 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|IND}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|CIV}} || 6 || 2 || 1 || 3 || 8 || 13 || −5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|KAZ}} || 1 || 0 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 2 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|KEN}} || 8 || 4 || 1 || 3 || 6 || 5 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LIB}} || 1 || 0 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LES}} || 13 || 5 || 5 || 3 || 15 || 14 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBR}} || 3 || 1 || 3 || 2 || 4 || 6 || –2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|LBY}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 2 || 2 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAD}} || 8 || 4 || 1 || 3 || 11 || 10 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAW}} || 18 || 9 || 4 || 5 || 23 || 18 || +5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MLI}} || 8 || 1 || 3 || 4 || 4 || 8 || −4
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MRI}} || 4 || 2 || 0 || 2 || 5 || 4 || +1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MAR}} || 7 || 0 || 1 || 6 || 2 || 15 || −13
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|MOZ}} || 20 || 10 || 6 || 4 || 25 || 14 || +11
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NIG}} || 3 || 1 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 3 || −1
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|NGA}} || 4 || 0 || 1 || 3 || 1 || 8 || −7
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RWA}} || 4 || 0 || 3 || 1 || 3 || 6 || −3
|-
|- bgcolor=CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|STP}} || 2 || 2 || 0 || 0 || 5 || 0 || +5
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|KSA}} || 2 || 0 || 0 || 2 || 1 || 3 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEN}} || 8 || 1 || 0 || 7 || 5 || 24 || −19
|-
|- bgcolor= CCFFCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SEY}} || 7 || 4 || 3 || 0 || 15 || 5 || +10
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|RSA}} || 14 || 1 || 5 || 8 || 10 || 27 || −17
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|SWZ}} || 9 || 1 || 4 || 4 || 8 || 10 || −2
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TAN}} || 4 || 0 || 2 || 2 || 1 || 4 || −3
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TOG}} || 2 || 1 || 0 || 1 || 1 || 1 || 0
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|TUN}} || 7 || 2 || 1 || 4 || 3 || 11 || −8
|-
|- bgcolor=FFFACD
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZAM}} || 22 || 2 || 11 || 9 || 11 || 27 || −16
|-
|- bgcolor=FFCCCC
| style="text-align:left;"| {{fb|ZIM}} || 15 || 7 || 0 || 8 || 26 || 29 || –3
|-
|- class="sortbottom"
! Total || 310 || 81 || 90 || 139 || 301 || 426 || −123
|}

==Honours==
===Regional===
* '''[[COSAFA Cup]]'''
** {{Gold1}} '''Champions (1)''': [[2015 COSAFA Cup|2015]]
** {{Silver2}} Runners-up (4): [[1997 COSAFA Cup|1997]], [[1999 COSAFA Cup|1999]], [[2022 COSAFA Cup|2022]], [[2024 COSAFA Cup|2024]]

==Notes==
{{notelist}}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
{{Commons category}}
* [http://www.nfa.org.na Namibia Football Association official website]
* [https://www.cafonline.com/member-associations/nam/ Namibia] at [[Confederation of African Football|CAF]]
* [https://www.fifa.com/about-fifa/associations/NAM Namibia] at [[FIFA]]
* [https://footballfashion.org/wordpress/2021/09/01/namibia-2021-22-umbro-home-away-and-third-kits/ Kits]

{{Namibia national football team}}
{{Namibia national football team managers}}
{{Namibia squad 1998 African Cup of Nations}}
{{Namibia squad 2008 Africa Cup of Nations}}
{{Namibia squad 2019 Africa Cup of Nations}}
{{Namibia squad 2023 Africa Cup of Nations}}
{{Football in Namibia}}
{{2008 Africa Cup of Nations finalists}}
{{CAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Namibia}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Namibia National Football Team}}
[[Category:Namibia national football team| ]]
[[Category:African national association football teams]]
